tasks.description: Uncomment ticker clock jump warning log — logger has been available since Phase 6
steps: Read src/core/ticker.ts — find the commented-out TODO at the clock jump detection site
Add import: import { getLogger } from './logger';

Replace the TODO comment with a real log call: getLogger().warn('system clock change detected, re-anchoring ticker', { component: 'ticker', wall_elapsed_ms: Math.round(wallElapsedMs), mono_elapsed_ms: Math.round(monoElapsedMs), interval_ms: interval })
Remove the 'Deferred until logging framework is integrated' comment
Run bun test — ALL tests pass
Commit: phase-8.5: wire clock jump warning to logger

tasks.description: Read swVersion from package.json instead of hardcoded '0.1.0' in plugin-factory.ts
steps: Read src/pipeline/plugin-factory.ts — find the swVersion: '0.1.0' TODO
Add import: import packageJson from '../../package.json'; (pattern from run.ts and version.ts)
Replace swVersion: '0.1.0', // TODO: read from package.json or build info with: swVersion: packageJson.version,
Run bun test — ALL tests pass
Commit: phase-8.5: read swVersion from package.json for NBIRTH
Read test/unit/plugins/outputs/mqtt.test.ts — find the parseMqttServerUrl describe block
Add test: parses mqtt://[::1]:1883 — expect host='::1', port=1883, protocol='mqtt'
Add test: parses mqtts://[2001:db8::1]:8883 — expect host='2001:db8::1', port=8883, protocol='mqtts'
Run bun test — ALL tests pass
Commit: phase-8.5: add IPv6 URL tests for parseMqttServerUrl

tasks.description: Structured config warnings — replace string[] with ConfigWarning[] for Phase 9 Web UI
steps: Read src/core/config.ts — understand the current warnings: string[] pattern
Read src/cli/commands/config-validate.ts — understand detectOutputPolicyConflicts() return type
Define ConfigWarning interface in config.ts: { code: string, severity: 'warning', message: string }
Export the ConfigWarning type
Change AgentConfig.warnings from string[] to ConfigWarning[]
Update the hub/policy conflict warning in parseConfig() to use ConfigWarning with code: 'hub_policy_conflict'
Update detectOutputPolicyConflicts() to return ConfigWarning[]
Assign codes: 'sparkplug_no_hub' for sparkplug without hub, 'mqtt_server_blocked' for blocked servers, 'hub_policy_conflict' for hub+policy conflict
Update config-validate.ts display logic to use warning.message for output (backward compat for display)
Update test/unit/core/config.test.ts — check warning objects have .code and .message
Update test/unit/cli/config-validate.test.ts — check warning objects have .code and .message
Run bun test — ALL tests pass
Commit: phase-8.5: structured ConfigWarning type for Phase 9 Web UI

tasks.description: Per-plugin metadata in runtime lifecycle logs — alias and pluginType in gather/flush/startup log lines
steps: Read src/pipeline/runtime.ts — find the gather loop, flush loop, and startup log sites

In the gather loop: when logging gather completion or errors, include plugin alias and pluginType in the log context: { component: 'pipeline', plugin: input.alias ?? 'input', plugin_type: input.pluginType }
In the flush loop: when logging flush or write errors, include output alias: { component: 'pipeline', plugin: output.alias ?? 'output' }
In start(): log each input, processor, aggregator, output with its alias and type during startup (before the 'pipeline started' log)
Check existing tests in test/unit/pipeline/runtime.test.ts and test/unit/cli/run.test.ts — ensure any tests checking log output still pass (log format may have changed)
Run bun test — ALL tests pass
Commit: phase-8.5: add plugin alias and type to runtime lifecycle logs
